title: asplenium wilfordii var. wilfordii
intro: Asplenium wilfordii var. wilfordii, also known as the Chinese maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, Asplenium wilfordii var. wilfordii is often dried and made into tea or infused in hot water to reap its medicinal properties.
